title.en: Music playlist player modeling and class diagrams
title.es: Modelado de reproductor de playlist de musica y diagramas de clases

description.en: Model a music playlist player using class diagrams in diagram.4geeks.com. Deliver the diagram exported as a PNG file.
description.es: Modela un reproductor de playlist de musica usando diagramas de clases en diagram.4geeks.com. Entrega el diagrama exportado como un archivo PNG.

instructions.us: Upload the two PNG files exported from your diagrams: one for the music playlist player and one for the digital wallet.
instructions.es: Sube los dos archivos PNG exportados de tus diagramas: uno del reproductor de playlist de musica y otro de la billetera digital.

sharing.en: I just completed Music playlist player modeling and class diagrams with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/music-playlist-player-modeling-and-class-diagrams #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #uml #classdiagrams #datamodeling
